title: DEX Trade History
description: Pull all DEX swap events and ERC-20 transfer volume for any wallet — decodes Swap log events from Uniswap, Curve, and other DEX contracts using getErc20TransfersForWalletAddress and getLogEventsByAddress.
useCase: Build a DEX trade history page that shows every swap a wallet made — token in/out, USD value, and which protocol handled the trade.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to look up trade history for
keyParams.contractAddress: Optional DEX router address to filter events
